Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The SetBufferLayout method defines the layout of the buffer, and whether it has an attached counter. Must be set before calling AllocateMemory.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void SetBufferLayout(size_t entryStrideInBytes, size_t entryCount, bool hasCounter = false, uint32_t counterResetValue = 0);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The byte stride of each structured data entry.
The number of entries to allocate in the array.
True to allocate an attached counter value for shader use, false to allocate only the data array.
The value assigned to the attached counter when it is reset.
